steps.title: Write the weight range
steps.content:
The elephant starts at $210$ pounds. After $d$ days, gaining more than $2$ but less than $3$ pounds per day gives this range:
$$210+2d\lt w\lt210+3d$$

steps.title: Compute the endpoints
steps.content:
Evaluate both ends of the range:
$$210+730\lt w\lt210+1{,}095$$
$$940\lt w\lt1{,}305$$
The answer is D.
